---
title: "conjunction_pvalue"
generated: true
description: "Conjunction p-value: the **maximum** per-contrast p-value over `k` contrasts (the p-scale dual of `conjunction`)."
---

[‹ back to `nitrix.stats.inference.multiple_comparisons`](../nitrix-stats-inference-multiple_comparisons.qmd)

<!-- nitrix:gen sig:conjunction_pvalue -->
```python
conjunction_pvalue(p_values: Float[Array, 'k *spatial']) -> Float[Array, '*spatial']
```
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen overview:conjunction_pvalue -->
Conjunction p-value: the **maximum** per-contrast p-value over `k`
contrasts (the p-scale dual of `conjunction`).

The minimum-statistic conjunction is significant at `alpha` iff every
contrast's p-value is below `alpha` iff their maximum is -- so `max p` is
the valid conjunction p-value (Nichols et al. 2005).
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->

<!-- nitrix:gen params:conjunction_pvalue -->
**Parameters**

| parameter | type | shape | default | description |
|------------|--------|--------|----------|--------------------------------------------------------------|
| `p_values` | `Float` | `k` × `*spatial` | — | — |

**Returns** `Float` — shape `*spatial`.
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->


<!-- nitrix:gen dims:conjunction_pvalue -->
**Tensor dimensions**

| dim | meaning |
|---|---|
| `k` | kernel or basis components |
| `*spatial` | the spatial axes of a grid (variadic) |
<!-- nitrix:/gen -->
